product_overview: PlaceTrack Pro is a campus placement management frontend for students, coordinators, and admins. It supports browsing and applying to drives, tracking applications and interviews, managing recruitment workflows, and viewing role-based dashboards and analytics.
core_goals: Allow students to register, sign in, and access their placement portal
Let students browse placement drives, check eligibility, and apply to open opportunities
Help students track applications, interviews, coding profiles, and notifications
Enable coordinators to manage companies, drives, applicants, and interviews
Provide admins with institution-wide access to management and analytics dashboards
Enforce role-based access to the correct portal for each user type

features.name: Authentication and Account Access
features.description: Users can sign in to the app, create a student account, and request a password reset email.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter email address -> Enter password -> Submit the sign-in form -> See the role-appropriate dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Enter email address -> Enter password -> Submit the sign-in form -> See an invalid credentials error message
Navigate to /signup -> Enter name -> Enter email address -> Enter password -> Enter branch -> Enter CGPA -> Submit the registration form -> See the student dashboard
Navigate to /forgot-password -> Enter email address -> Submit the reset request form -> See a generic success confirmation

features.name: Student Placement Drives
features.description: Students can browse open drives, inspect details and eligibility, and apply when eligible.
user_flows: Navigate to /student/drives -> View the list of open drives -> Open a drive from the list -> Review drive details -> Check eligibility status -> Apply for the drive if eligible -> See the application reflected in the drive view

Navigate to /student/drives -> View the list of open drives -> Open a drive from the list -> Review drive details -> Check eligibility status -> See that applying is unavailable when ineligible or already applied

features.name: Application Tracking
features.description: Students can review all submitted applications, inspect application details, and withdraw when allowed by status.
user_flows: Navigate to /student/applications -> View the applications list with status indicators -> Open an application -> Review the application timeline and related details

Navigate to /student/applications -> View the applications list with status indicators -> Open an application that is still withdrawable -> Withdraw the application -> See the status update in the application details

features.name: Coding Profile Sync
features.description: Students can enter coding platform usernames, sync platform data, and review synced stats.
user_flows: Navigate to /student/coding -> Enter usernames for supported coding platforms -> Sync a platform profile -> See updated coding statistics
Navigate to /student/coding -> Enter usernames for supported coding platforms -> Sync all available profiles -> See the combined synced summary

features.name: Coordinator Drive and Company Management
features.description: Coordinators can create and manage companies and placement drives, and review applicants for each drive.
user_flows: Navigate to /coordinator/companies -> View the company list -> Add a new company -> Enter company details -> Save the company -> See it appear in the list
Navigate to /coordinator/drives -> View the drives list -> Create a new drive -> Enter required drive details -> Save the drive -> See the new drive in the list
Navigate to /coordinator/drives -> View the drives list -> Open a drive -> Close an open drive -> See the drive status change
Navigate to /coordinator/drives -> View the drives list -> Open a drive's applicants list -> Review applicants -> Update an applicant's status -> See the updated status in the list

features.name: Interview Scheduling and Feedback
features.description: Coordinators can schedule interviews for applicants and later record feedback and results.
user_flows: Navigate to /coordinator/interviews -> View scheduled interviews -> Open the scheduling form -> Choose an application -> Enter date, time, mode, and meeting link if needed -> Submit the interview schedule -> See the new interview in the list
Navigate to /coordinator/interviews -> View scheduled interviews -> Open an interview -> Enter feedback -> Select an interview result -> Save the update -> See the interview record updated

features.name: Notifications Inbox
features.description: Students and coordinators can review notifications and mark them as read.
user_flows: Navigate to /student/notifications -> View grouped notifications -> Open a notification -> Mark it as read -> See the unread state clear
Navigate to /student/notifications -> View grouped notifications -> Mark all notifications as read -> See the inbox update

features.name: Role-Based Access Control
features.description: The app routes users to the correct portal based on role and blocks access to unauthorized sections.
user_flows: Navigate to /login while signed out -> Try to open a protected route -> See redirection back to /login
Navigate to /student/drives while signed in as a student -> Access the student area successfully
Navigate to /coordinator/drives while signed in as a student -> Try to access the coordinator area -> See access blocked
Navigate to /admin while signed in as an admin -> Access the admin area successfully

features.name: Dashboards and Analytics
features.description: Students, coordinators, and admins can view role-specific dashboard summaries and charts.
user_flows: Navigate to /student -> View placement stats, recent activity, and charts on the student dashboard
Navigate to /coordinator -> View placement metrics and summary charts on the coordinator dashboard
Navigate to /admin -> View institution-wide analytics and placement metrics on the admin dashboard

routes.description: Student registration with email/password or Google OAuth
Student dashboard with stats and charts
Drive detail with eligibility check and apply
Drive applicants list and status updates

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password or Google OAuth
user_interactions: Click Sign In button to submit
Click Continue with Google for OAuth
See error toast on invalid credentials

features.name: Student Registration
user_interactions: Fill name, email, password, branch, and CGPA fields
Redirect to student dashboard on success

features.name: Browse Placement Drives
features.description: Students browse and filter open placement drives
user_interactions: Click a drive to view details

features.name: Application Tracking
features.description: Students track application status and withdraw
user_interactions: View applications list with status badges
Click application to view detail and timeline

features.name: Coding Profiles
features.description: Link and sync coding platform profiles
user_interactions: Enter usernames for GitHub, LeetCode, Codeforces, CodeChef, GeeksforGeeks

features.name: Coordinator Drive Management
features.description: Coordinators create and manage placement drives
user_interactions: Create new drive via dialog form

features.name: Interview Scheduling
user_interactions: Open schedule dialog and fill date, time, mode, link

features.name: Role-Based Access Control
features.description: Routes protected by student, coordinator, and admin roles

known_limitations.issue: Settings page is read-only with no save functionality
known_limitations.impact: Users cannot change account settings from UI
Search input does not filter or navigate

known_limitations.issue: Student dashboard weekly chart uses mock data
known_limitations.impact: Chart may not reflect real application activity

known_limitations.issue: No reset password page in frontend
known_limitations.impact: Password reset flow incomplete in UI

known_limitations.issue: No company edit UI for coordinators
known_limitations.impact: Companies can be created but not edited via UI
